column1: Whose shoes are these? - They may be_________shoes. Oh, yes, they are_____________. (I/I)
This atlas is__________. The other one is_________ . (HE/SHE)
Denis, I'm sorry. I can't help you, you'll have to do it____________ . (YOU)
I'll give Larisa___________atlas and you'll give Alla__________ . (I/YOU)
Vera always makes pies______________and they are always wonderful. (SHE)
A penguin is a large black and white bird. It cannot fly but it uses_______wings for swimming. (IT)
Have a look! The penguin is enjoying_________ . (IT)
